hero.subtitle: A YouTube Music client with Material Design 3, for Android.

warning.title: Redirect Notice
warning.body: You will be redirected outside of OpenTune Web to an external demo provided by Appetize.io.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Discover all the features that make OpenTune the best client for your music.
features.yt_title: YouTube Music Client with Material Design 3
features.yt_desc: Provides a modern and elegant YouTube Music experience on Android, with an intuitive and optimized interface.
features.design_desc: Based on Material Design 3, with vivid colors, modern typography, and smooth transitions.
features.ui_desc: Simplified interface for quick access to all features, with customization options.
features.explore_desc: Access to a vast music catalog with advanced search and smart recommendations.
features.quality_desc: High-quality music, optimized for different devices and network conditions.
features.playlist_desc: Create and organize playlists, and download songs to listen offline.
features.sync_desc: Sync your YouTube Music account to access your libraries and receive notifications.
features.advanced_desc: Voice and gesture playback control, with Chromecast and Bluetooth support.
features.library_desc: Organize your music with advanced filtering and categorization tools.
features.multilang_desc: Available in multiple languages with accurate translations and culturally relevant localization.
features.updates_desc: Regular updates with new features, security improvements, and optimization.
features.ux_desc: Intuitive navigation and agile performance with a user-friendly interface that enhances the experience.

oss.title: Open Source at its Heart
oss.body: OpenTune is built by music lovers for music lovers. Contribute, customize, and help us build the best open source player for Android.

screenshots.title: The Interface
screenshots.subtitle: A glimpse at the OpenTune experience.

support.title: Need help?
support.body: Submit a request or report an issue directly to the development team.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Download the latest version of OpenTune for your platform.

footer.license_text: Licensed under GPL-3.0 Open Source License.

support_page.title: Send Feedback
support_page.subtitle: Send your issue or describe your request
support_page.type_label: What do you want to tell us?
support_page.success_body: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you soon.
support_page.privacy_desc: Your data is protected and will only be used to contact you about your report.
support_page.response_desc: We normally respond in more than 24 hours due to high demand for requests.

contributors.title: Community & Contributors
contributors.subtitle: OpenTune is built by the community, for the community. Every commit, bug report, and translation brings us closer to the best open source music experience.
contributors.how_subtitle: Choose your path and help us make OpenTune even better.
contributors.code_desc: Implement new features or fix bugs in our Kotlin codebase.
contributors.design_desc: Improve the Material 3 implementation and visual polish.
contributors.translate_desc: Help us localize OpenTune for music lovers around the world.
contributors.bugs_desc: Found a flaw? Detailed reports help us maintain stability.
